entities.name: MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop grown in the Sahel region whose yield shows high spatial variability

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area

entities.name: SAHEL
entities.description: A semi-arid region in Africa where millet is grown

entities.name: CONCEPTUAL MODEL
entities.description: A theoretical framework designed to explain the phenomenon of millet yield variability

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE ANALYSIS
entities.description: The statistical analysis of key relationships based on published studies

entities.name: SPATIAL VARIABILITY OF YIELD
entities.description: The variation in crop yield across different locations within the same farm

entities.name: EDAPHIC FACTORS
entities.description: Soil-related factors that influence crop yield variability

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY PROPERTIES
entities.description: Chemical and biological properties of the soil that affect plant growth

entities.name: WATER AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The amount of water accessible to plants in the soil

entities.name: SAHELIAN SOILS
entities.description: The specific soil types found in the Sahel region

entities.name: BIOTIC FACTORS
entities.description: Living organisms or biological processes that influence soil variability

entities.name: ABIOTIC FACTORS
entities.description: Non-living physical and chemical factors that influence soil variability

entities.name: TREES
entities.description: Perennial plants that act as biotic factors influencing soil fertility

entities.name: TERMITES
entities.description: Insects whose activity influences soil properties

entities.name: FERTILITY MANAGEMENT PRACTICES
entities.description: Human interventions used to improve soil nutrient levels

entities.name: PESTS
entities.description: Organisms that damage crops and influence yield variability

entities.name: DISEASES
entities.description: Pathological conditions affecting crops

entities.name: RAINFALL
entities.description: Precipitation characterized by amount, intensity, and distribution

entities.name: WIND EROSION
entities.description: The removal of soil by wind, acting as an abiotic factor

entities.name: SOIL CHEMICAL PROPERTIES
entities.description: The chemical characteristics of the soil influencing yield

entities.name: ORGANIC CARBON
entities.description: A key soil chemical property influencing yield variability

entities.name: PH
entities.description: The measure of acidity or alkalinity of the soil

entities.name: ALUMINUM SATURATION
entities.description: The proportion of soil exchange sites occupied by aluminum

entities.name: AVAILABLE PHOSPHORUS
entities.description: The form of phosphorus that can be absorbed by plants

entities.name: SOIL PHYSICAL PROPERTIES
entities.description: The physical characteristics of soil affecting water movement and retention

entities.name: INFILTRATION RATE
entities.description: The rate at which water enters the soil

entities.name: WATER RETENTION CAPACITY
entities.description: The ability of the soil to hold water

entities.name: SOIL STRUCTURE
entities.description: The arrangement of soil particles

entities.name: TEXTURE
entities.description: The relative proportion of sand, silt, and clay in the soil

entities.name: SOIL SURFACE CONDITIONS
entities.description: The state of the top layer of the soil

entities.name: SOIL HETEROGENEITY
entities.description: The non-uniform distribution of soil properties across a field

entities.name: PRECISION AGRICULTURE TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Advanced farming technologies used to manage spatial variability
